meta.title: QBC | Physics-Secured Digital Assets with On-Chain AGI
meta.description: Qubitcoin (QBC) is a physics-secured Layer 1 blockchain combining Proof-of-SUSY-Alignment mining, post-quantum cryptography, and the Aether Tree on-chain AGI engine.

hero.subtitle: Qubitcoin combines Proof-of-SUSY-Alignment mining, post-quantum cryptography, and the Aether Tree AGI that tracks integration metrics from genesis.

blockchain.title: Quantum Blockchain
blockchain.item1: Proof-of-SUSY-Alignment mining with VQE quantum circuits
blockchain.item2: Post-quantum Dilithium5 signatures for future-proof security
blockchain.item3: Golden ratio (phi) emission: 3.3B max supply with phi-halving

qvm.title: Quantum Virtual Machine
qvm.item2: Deploy Solidity contracts with quantum extensions
qvm.item4: Cross-chain bridges to ETH, SOL, MATIC, BNB + more

aether.title: Aether Tree AGI

aether.item2: Phi integration metric (IIT-inspired) computed every block
aether.item3: 10 Sephirot cognitive nodes with quantum states
aether.item4: Proof-of-Thought consensus embedded in every block
